title: Alan Partridge - Stratagem
tagline: Welcome to STRATAGEM, a live stage show that promises to inform, educate and entertain in approximately equal measure.
overview: Devised, written, choreographed, performed and funded by Alan Partridge, Stratagem sees Alan not just treading the boards but pounding them, atop stages graced by such luminaries as Michael Ball, Jack Whitehall and Welsh rockers the Stereophonics.
